code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()

  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0

  while i < n
    if i % 2 == 0
      let part_opt = parts.get(i)
      match part_opt
      when Some(p)
        if first
          result = p
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{p}"
        end
      when None
        # skip
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
